title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIM Calcutta

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIM Calcutta
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at IIM Calcutta. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Srinagar-based team.

About IIM Calcutta:
IIM Calcutta is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Calcutta!
